string.text:
The AKS-74U "Badger" (Kalashnikov short assault rifle 74 with a folding stock) features an integrated suppressor similar to a "screwdriver-style" design, with holes drilled along the rifling grooves to further reduce sound. The name "Badger" reinforces the analogy with the Honey Badger. 

 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] All Picatinny and "Swallow Tail" sights
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Integrated suppressor
